posts.author: Jez (Jeremy Maley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would like the possibility to :
• Resize the right column to allow information to be displayed when item names are long.
• Choose to display only the item name.
• Allow a second piece of information to be displayed in the “label by” parameter. (ie display dates)
For instance a cutomer would like to diplay only the item name on the left panel, and then as a label, the dates and the person.

Thanks

What are you trying to achieve

Gain more flexibility and readability on the Gantt view, in monday as well as for pdf exports.

posts.author: eva753kimson (eva kimson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We’d really love more flexibility in the Gantt view to improve readability, both in Monday and in PDF exports. It would be great if we could resize the right column so long item names aren’t cut off, choose to display only the item name on the left panel, and have the option to show two pieces of info in the “label by” field—like dates and the assigned person. This would make the Gantt view much clearer and more useful.

posts.author: Jez (Jeremy Maley)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes ! please upvote my request
